name: blindspot-audit
description: Find project unknown unknowns, hidden risks, stale assumptions, and missing decisions with a durable BLINDSPOT_LEDGER.md.

interface.shortDescription: Find hidden project gaps and keep repeat audits focused
interface.longDescription: Use Blindspot Audit to scan software, creative, research, content, and business projects for unknown unknowns: hidden risks, stale assumptions, missing decisions, and unasked questions. It creates or updates BLINDSPOT_LEDGER.md so later audits compare against prior findings and report only what is new, changed, or resolved.
defaultPrompt: Run a deep blindspot audit on this project.
